messages.content: Todo 1.1: PASS. Todo 1.2: PASS(T1冻结). Todo 1.3: PASS(SSoT+复现性).
Todo 1.4 3大不公平问题: 1)FIFO/DP给HDV发幽灵命令 2)speed_tracking被HDV污染 3)control_mode不一致
Todo 1.4实现完成。95项测试PASS, 零回归。Gate 1/2/3静态PASS, Q1 FAIR_BASELINE_ANCHOR已形成。
Todo 2.1 调查发现4大问题: anchor语义混淆, contract缺stream, 无eligible rate, 坐标系不一致
VOTE(7项): stream双加, 三分逻辑消除生存者偏差(Gemini), FEEDBACK加anchor_event_type, resolve_anchor_event_type加ValueError, eligible快照, 冻结语义docstring, per-episode追踪
Todo 2.1实现完成。106项测试PASS(含11项新增), 零回归。Sonnet 7/7 + Gemini 5/5 VERIFIED。Gate 1/2/3全PASS。
Todo 2.2 调查: merge_policy只影响contract层不影响实际控制。hierarchical+fixed时contract说expected_pos=0.0但Zone C仍做gap-based换道—语义不一致。
原方案: fixed时跳过Zone C(zone_c_actions={})
FIX-1 FLAG(补merge_policy校验). FIX-2 FLAG(anchor_event变量顺序风险). FIX-3 APPROVE. Zone A保持. Todo2.1兼容.
FIX-1 FLAG(__post_init__条件创建MergePointManager). FIX-2 FLAG(**BUG**: L354 anchor_event在merge_policy定义前→UnboundLocalError). FIX-3 APPROVE.
FIX-1 **REJECT**(致命: LC_MODE_PROHIBIT_ALL+跳过Zone C→ramp CAV物理卡死). 正确方案: Zone C不跳过,MergePointManager以fixed params(search_start=fallback_pos→立即fallback merge).

VOTE(7项,采纳Gemini REJECT): FIX-1改版—Zone C保留,fixed用MergePointParams(search_start=fallback_pos)→立即fallback; FIX-2 run.py传merge_policy; FIX-3修Sonnet BUG(anchor_event移到merge_policy后); FIX-4 lc_complete error只在flexible计入; FIX-5 merge_policy校验ValueError; FIX-6 command_builder不改; FIX-7测试
